name: Classic Margherita
description: San Marzano tomato sauce, fior di latte mozzarella, fresh basil, and extra virgin olive oil on our signature stone-baked base. Simple, timeless, perfection.

name: Pepperoni
description: Loaded with spicy pepperoni slices over our homemade tomato sauce and melted mozzarella. A timeless favourite with a kick.

name: Hot Honey Pepperoni
description: Spicy pepperoni finished with a generous drizzle of hot honey, mozzarella and fresh basil. Sweet, smoky, and seriously addictive.

name: BBQ Chicken
description: Smoky BBQ base with tender chicken pieces, red onion, mixed peppers, and mozzarella. A crowd favourite with a bold, sweet-smoky flavour.

name: Meat Feast
description: For the meat lovers. Pepperoni, ham, chicken, beef, and sausage piled high on tomato sauce with melted mozzarella.

name: Vegetarian Supreme
description: Roasted peppers, mushrooms, red onion, sweetcorn, olives, and fresh tomato on a bed of mozzarella and tomato sauce.

name: Calzone
description: Folded pizza pocket stuffed with ham, mushrooms, mozzarella, and ricotta, baked until golden. Served with a side of marinara sauce.

name: Truffle & Mushroom
description: White truffle cream base with sauteed wild mushrooms, mozzarella, parmesan shavings, and rocket. An indulgent gourmet experience.

name: Half Roast Chicken
description: Succulent half roast chicken served with your choice of side. Slow-roasted to perfection with Mediterranean herbs.

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
description: Rich, slow-cooked beef ragout served over perfectly al dente spaghetti, finished with a dusting of parmesan.

name: Carbonara
description: Creamy egg and parmesan sauce tossed with crispy pancetta and spaghetti. A Roman classic done right.

name: Chicken Alfredo
description: Tender grilled chicken in a velvety alfredo cream sauce with penne pasta, finished with cracked black pepper.

name: Lasagne Al Forno
description: Layers of pasta, rich beef ragu, creamy bechamel sauce, and melted mozzarella, baked until golden and bubbling.

name: Truffle Pasta
description: Tagliatelle in a luxurious truffle cream sauce with sauteed mushrooms and parmesan. Pure indulgence.

name: Garlic Dough Balls
description: Soft, pillowy dough balls baked with garlic butter. Served with a rich marinara dipping sauce.

name: Hot Honey Dough Balls
description: Our signature dough balls drizzled with hot honey and a pinch of chilli flakes. Sweet heat at its best.

name: Classic Fries
description: Golden, crispy fries seasoned with sea salt. The perfect side to any meal.

name: Loaded Fries
description: Crispy fries smothered in melted mozzarella, crispy bacon, spring onion and a garlic aioli drizzle.

name: Tiramisu
description: Layers of coffee-soaked sponge, mascarpone cream and cocoa — the classic Italian pick-me-up.

name: Chocolate Gelato
description: Rich, velvety Italian chocolate gelato made with real cocoa. A decadent finish to any meal.

name: Strawberry Gelato
description: Smooth, fruity gelato bursting with real strawberry flavour. Light, refreshing, and naturally delicious.

name: Tiramisu Gelato
description: The classic Italian dessert reimagined as gelato. Coffee, mascarpone, and a hint of cocoa in every spoonful.

name: Vanilla Gelato
description: Silky smooth vanilla gelato made with real vanilla bean. A timeless classic that pairs with everything.

name: Chocolate Profiteroles
description: Light choux pastry puffs filled with cream and drizzled with rich Belgian chocolate sauce.

name: Lemon Profiteroles
description: Delicate profiteroles filled with zesty lemon cream and finished with a light citrus glaze.

name: Pistachio Profiteroles
description: Choux pastry puffs filled with pistachio cream and topped with crushed pistachios. A nutty delight.

name: Coca Cola
description: The classic refreshment. Served chilled.

name: Diet Coke
description: All the taste, zero sugar. Refreshingly crisp.

name: Fanta Orange
description: Bright and bubbly with a burst of orange flavour.

name: Sprite
description: Crisp, clear, and refreshingly lemon-lime.

name: Garlic Mayo
description: Creamy garlic mayonnaise, perfect for dipping fries or drizzling on pizza.

name: BBQ Sauce
description: Sweet, smoky BBQ sauce. A classic companion to any meal.

name: Truffle Mayo
description: Luxurious truffle-infused mayonnaise for the gourmet touch.

name: Hot Chilli Sauce
description: Fiery chilli sauce for those who like it hot.
